title: Actual Furnace Fires
description: Well... it has actual fires in furnaces, smokers, etc.
body:
**If you have Fabric installed. you'll need [PolyTone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) mod for this to work.**

---

This Resource pack adds better fires in furnaces, blast furnaces and smokers.

![Furnaces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f7b0195888ecc43bf669ea2d2f1e34fcae9da3b_0.webp)
![Smokers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56ab3add7788a00665d10ea2e4b39037ba4f89fd_0.webp)

And it also works with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)!

![Stoves from Farmer's Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/542f6103a5e2acfddfa5c27f8fc98957cf401de6_0.webp)

Special thanks to: [The Great Shrimpsby](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-great-shrimpsby)'s author for the shader in their resource pack for transparent textures.
